name: behabior-dino
description: Dino Run project — Chrome Dino-style endless runner built with Flutter & Flame. Use this skill when working on the Dino Run game code, assets, or build.
instructions:
## Project Structure

- `lib/core/dino_game.dart` — Main FlameGame, update/render loop, collision, spawn
- `lib/core/entities/` — Dino, Obstacle, Ground, Cloud
- `lib/core/systems/score_system.dart` — Score, speed, high score
- `lib/core/config/game_config.dart` — Constants (gravity, speed, sizes)
- `lib/ui/screens/game_screen.dart` — Flutter wrapper with Listener for taps
- `assets/images/dino/dino_run_00-03.png` — Dino run sprites (4 frames)
- `assets/icon/logo.png` — App icon source (512x512)

## Key Patterns

- All sprite loading has try/catch fallback to Canvas rendering
- Input via Flutter `Listener` wrapping `GameWidget` (not Flame TapCallbacks)
- Game states: `_started`, `_gameOver`, `_initialised`
- Dino states: `running`, `jumping`, `dead`
- Collision: rect overlap with 40% margin reduction
- Game over text centered between groundY and screen bottom

## Commands

```bash
flutter clean && flutter pub get    # Clean build
flutter analyze                     # Check for errors
flutter build apk --release         # Build APK
adb push ... && pm install-create   # Install on Android 14+
```

## App Icon Regeneration

```bash
python3 -c "
from PIL import Image
img = Image.open('assets/icon/logo.png')
for folder,size in [('mipmap-mdpi',48),('hdpi',72),('xhdpi',96),('xxhdpi',144),('xxxhdpi',192)]:
    img.resize((size,size), Image.LANCZOS).save(f'android/app/src/main/res/{folder}/ic_launcher.png')
"
```

## Git Flow

- Commit prefixes: `fix:`, `feat:`, `refactor:`, `docs:`, `chore:`
- Semantic tags: `v1.0.0`, `v1.1.0`, etc.
- Push: `git push origin main --tags`
